name: CreateTable
description: CREATE TABLE in PostGIS and INSERT row data; always adds a primary key (from Id Values or auto-increment). Destructive when replace_table=True.

inputParameters.name: CToggle
inputParameters.description: Set True to CREATE the table and INSERT rows (destructive if replace_table=True)

inputParameters.name: columnTypes
inputParameters.description: SQL types parallel to column_names (e.g. text, integer, double precision)

inputParameters.name: values
inputParameters.description: DataTree of row data — branch per row; each branch holds values for all columns

inputParameters.name: idValues
inputParameters.description: Optional DataTree of primary-key values — branch per row (one id per branch); omit for auto-increment id

inputParameters.name: replaceTable
inputParameters.description: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS before CREATE (destructive)
